library.title: My Music
library.swipeHint: Swipe ← to add to queue • Swipe → for next • Long press for options
library.permissionMessage: To scan your music, we need access to your audio files
library.permissionDeniedMessage: We can't scan your music without permissions. Please enable permissions in app settings.
library.noMusicFoundMessage: No audio files found on your device

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. Songs will not be removed from your library.

actions.errorLoadingTrackSkipped: Error loading track. That song was skipped and playback continued with the next one.
actions.errorLoadingTrackNoFallback: Error loading track. There are no more playable songs to continue.
actions.autoOptimizedPreset: Automatic adjustment applied to the song
actions.persistTrackFailed: Could not persist track to local storage

duplicates.title: Duplicate Songs
duplicates.message: The following songs are already in your library:
duplicates.alreadyExists: This song already exists in the player
duplicates.alreadyInPlaylist: This song is already in the playlist

eq.title: Equalizer
eq.slideHint: Swipe horizontally to access all 31 EQ bands
eq.horizontalSlider: Horizontal slider to navigate EQ bands
eq.autoDescription: This mode listens to the first seconds of each song and applies an equalizer curve that fits the track.
eq.autoBannerDescription: It analyzes audio on your device and applies an automatic adjustment to keep the sound punchy, clear, and stable.

dsp.title: Epicenter DSP
dsp.subtitle: Bass restorer
dsp.description: The Epicenter processor reconstructs low frequencies lost in audio compression.
dsp.autoDescription: This mode adjusts the processor automatically on each song to reinforce bass without manual tuning.

fx.title: Spatial effects
fx.subtitle: Reverb and concert hall
fx.reverbDescription: Light Schroeder-style reverb: short pre-delay, four comb filters, and two all-pass filters for depth without muddying the cabin.
fx.concertHallDescription: Larger hall inspired by concert rooms: moderate pre-delay, stable tail, high-frequency damping, and limited wet mixing.
fx.description: Concert Hall uses a real-time algorithmic hall. It is not a replacement for real IR convolution plus vehicle MIMO correction, but it keeps clarity with controlled dry/wet mixing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceDescription: Switch between light and dark mode
settings.description: Music player with Epicenter DSP processor that reconstructs low frequencies lost in audio compression.
settings.legalDescription: Privacy policy and terms of service
settings.howToUseDescription: Learn how to import music and customize your sound

howToUse.title: How to use Epicenter Hi-Fi
howToUse.intro: Epicenter Hi-Fi v7.0 is a local music player focused on Epicenter DSP plus AI implementation for intelligent audio experiences.
howToUse.libraryBody: Use the main library screen to import files manually or scan your device on Android.
howToUse.playerBody: Select any song to play, or use the Play and Shuffle buttons in Songs, Artists, or Playlists.
howToUse.queueBody: Add tracks to the queue, play next, or reorder items for the exact listening flow you want.
howToUse.eqBody: Open the EQ tab to adjust all 31 bands and return to a neutral sound whenever you want.
howToUse.dspBody: Use Epicenter DSP as the project’s core differentiator and tune Sweep, Width, Intensity, Balance, and Volume to match your profile.
howToUse.playlistsBody: Create playlists in the Playlists tab, then play in order or shuffle instantly.
howToUse.tipsBody: Hi-Res tracks are marked automatically. You can switch languages and crossfade settings in Settings.

onboarding.title: Quick Start
onboarding.step1Description: Import audio files or scan your device library to get started.
onboarding.step2Description: Use the 31-band EQ and Epicenter processor to shape your bass and clarity.
onboarding.step3Description: Create playlists, queue tracks, and keep playing without ads.

legal.privacyIntro: Epicenter Hi-Fi stores your library and preferences locally on your device.
legal.privacyData: We do not collect, sell, or share personal data. No analytics or advertising SDKs are used.
legal.privacyStorage: Audio files remain on your device. The app only accesses storage when you import or scan music.
legal.privacySecurity: If you choose to grant permissions, you can revoke them anytime from system settings.
legal.privacyContact: For questions about privacy, contact the developer through the support email listed on Google Play.
legal.termsIntro: By using Epicenter Hi-Fi, you agree to use the app for personal, lawful playback of your own audio files.
legal.termsUsage: You are responsible for the content you load and for respecting applicable copyright laws.
legal.termsContent: The app is provided as-is without warranties, and features may evolve over time.
legal.termsAvailability: We may update or discontinue features to improve stability and user experience.
legal.termsContact: For support, use the contact details provided on the store listing.

search.globalSubtitle: Search your entire library by song or artist
search.startTyping: Type to search your entire library
